name: Battlefield Tragedy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>場</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>惨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Main Phase 2, if no monsters battled each other this turn: You can discard 1 card; Set 1 "Battlefield Tragedy" directly from your Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use this effect of "Battlefield Tragedy" once per turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if any monsters battled each other this turn: The turn player sends 5 cards from the top of their Deck to the GY.
eff: During your Main Phase 2, if no monsters battled each other this turn: You can discard 1 card; Set 1 "Battlefield Tragedy" directly from your Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use this effect of "Battlefield Tragedy" once per turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if any monsters battled each other this turn: The turn player sends 5 cards from the top of their Deck to the GY.

action: Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
